description_long: This is a luxurious, dark brown Chesterfield-style sofa with a classic, deep button-tufted backrest and armrests. The upholstery appears to be high-quality leather, giving it a glossy, rich finish. The sofa features two large, flat seat cushions that are smooth and un-tufted, contrasting with the ornate back and arms. The armrests are rolled and padded, matching the height of the backrest and adorned with button detailing. The legs are short, rounded, and dark, positioned at each corner for stability. This elegant piece would be well-suited for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, stylish cafes, or residential living rooms.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield sofa with deep button-tufted back and arms, smooth seat cushions, and short rounded legs. Its glossy finish and classic design evoke luxury and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep button-tufted backrest and armrests, and two smooth seat cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled, padded armrest and the sofa's depth, with the tufted pattern visible on the arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth back with subtle tufting and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other rolled armrest and the sofa's profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, flat seat cushions and a single continuous, deeply tufted back cushion; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with deep button-tufting and a classic Chesterfield profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at each corner, likely made of dark wood, minimally visible and slightly recessed.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a curved profile, fully upholstered and deeply button-tufted for a plush, classic look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deep button-tufted leather upholstery on the backrest and arms, with smooth, un-tufted seat cushions; the leather has a glossy, uniform finish.
